name: Direct Lake Semantic Model + Report
description: Create a Direct Lake semantic model from lakehouse Delta tables and bind a report for zero-copy analytics.

steps.command: fabio lakehouse load-table --workspace $WS_ID --id $LH_ID --table sales --path Files/staging/sales.csv --mode Overwrite --format Csv --header true

steps.description: Create Direct Lake semantic model from TMDL.
Frame the model (required before DAX queries work).
Create report bound to the semantic model.

tips: TMDL is required for Direct Lake; model.bim cannot express directLake partitions.
definition.pbism must use version 4.2 with Fabric schema URL.
Use --query 'data.id' to extract created item IDs from each step.
